zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert De Quincy於1200年之前出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆時，他的父親Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester39歲，母親Margaret de Beaumont45歲。他和Elen ferch Llywelyn至少有3個女兒。他去世於1257年8月在英國米德萊可倫敦，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦可拉肯維爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert De Quincy was born before 1200, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, was 39 and his mother, Margaret de Beaumont, was 45. He had at least 3 daughters with Elen ferch Llywelyn. He died in August 1257, in London, Middlesex, England, and was buried in Clerkenwell, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert De Quincy est né avant 1200, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Beaumont, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Elen ferch Llywelyn. Il est décédé en août 1257, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Clerkenwell, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert De Quincy vor 1200 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester 39 und seine Mutter Margaret de Beaumont 45. Er hatte mit Elen ferch Llywelyn mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb im August 1257 in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Clerkenwell, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Quincy è nato il prima del 1200 nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Beaumont, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Elen ferch Llywelyn. Morì nel agosto 1257, nel London, Middlesex, England, e fu sepolto a Clerkenwell, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Quincyが1200年以前にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで生まれた時，父Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchesterは39歳，母Margaret de Beaumontは45歳であった。彼はElen ferch Llywelynとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1257年8月にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンクラーケンウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Quincy(이)가 1200년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Beaumont(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Elen ferch Llywelyn(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 8월 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 클레르켄웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Quincy nasceu antes 1200, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Beaumont, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Elen ferch Llywelyn. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1257, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Clerkenwell, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert De Quincy родился перед 1200 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Beaumont, 45. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Elen ferch Llywelyn. Он умер август 1257 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности клиркенвелл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert De Quincy nació antes de 1200, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret de Beaumont, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Elen ferch Llywelyn. Murió en agosto de 1257, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Clerkenwell, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
